# ctl_corpus.txt -- scenario-ctl JSON-lines protocol golden (Track RF1 D).
#
# SNAP<TAB> = SerializeScenarioSnapshot output (C++ writer; tui parse_snapshot reads).
# REQ<TAB>  = tui request builder wire form (tui writer; C++ ParseScenarioRequest reads).
# The wire form's trailing newline is stripped for storage. Regeneration:
# KAIROS_REGEN=1 ctest -R test_ctl_corpus.
SNAP	{"ok":true,"err":"","scenarios":[]}
SNAP	{"ok":true,"err":"","scenarios":[{"name":"s-stopped","state":"stopped","pid":0,"cum_fills":0,"cum_shares":0,"last_fill_ts":0,"last_exit_reason":"","live":false,"restart_count":0,"gave_up":false},{"name":"s-starting","state":"starting","pid":111,"cum_fills":0,"cum_shares":0,"last_fill_ts":0,"last_exit_reason":"","live":false,"restart_count":0,"gave_up":false},{"name":"s-waitopen","state":"wait-open","pid":222,"cum_fills":0,"cum_shares":0,"last_fill_ts":0,"last_exit_reason":"","live":true,"restart_count":0,"gave_up":false},{"name":"s-inwindow","state":"in-window","pid":333,"cum_fills":5,"cum_shares":5000,"last_fill_ts":1700000000,"last_exit_reason":"","live":true,"restart_count":0,"gave_up":false},{"name":"s-fillrem","state":"fill-remainder","pid":444,"cum_fills":2,"cum_shares":2000,"last_fill_ts":0,"last_exit_reason":"","live":true,"restart_count":0,"gave_up":false},{"name":"s-closed","state":"closed-exited","pid":0,"cum_fills":0,"cum_shares":0,"last_fill_ts":0,"last_exit_reason":"window closed / run complete","live":false,"restart_count":1,"gave_up":false},{"name":"s-crashed","state":"crashed","pid":0,"cum_fills":0,"cum_shares":0,"last_fill_ts":0,"last_exit_reason":"order backend connect failed","live":true,"restart_count":2,"gave_up":false},{"name":"s-stopping","state":"stopping","pid":555,"cum_fills":0,"cum_shares":0,"last_fill_ts":0,"last_exit_reason":"","live":false,"restart_count":0,"gave_up":false}]}
SNAP	{"ok":true,"err":"","scenarios":[{"name":"s-give","state":"crashed","pid":999,"cum_fills":0,"cum_shares":0,"last_fill_ts":0,"last_exit_reason":"reject:\nline2\ttab \"q\" \\slash \u001c sep 台積","live":true,"restart_count":3,"gave_up":true}]}
SNAP	{"ok":false,"err":"unknown cmd","scenarios":[]}
SNAP	{"ok":true,"err":"","scenarios":[{"name":"s-halted","state":"halted","pid":0,"cum_fills":3,"cum_shares":39,"last_fill_ts":0,"last_exit_reason":"halted: 3 consecutive order failures (ack timeout)","live":true,"restart_count":0,"gave_up":false}]}
REQ	{"cmd":"list"}
REQ	{"cmd":"start","name":"2330-Buy","mode":"paper"}
REQ	{"cmd":"start","name":"2330-Buy","mode":"live"}
REQ	{"cmd":"start","name":"sim-x","mode":"test"}
REQ	{"cmd":"stop","name":"2330-Buy"}
REQ	{"cmd":"start","name":"ev\"il\n\ttab\\x\u001c台","mode":"paper"}
REQ	{"cmd":"stop","name":"ev\"il\n\ttab\\x\u001c台"}
